case_title: BOBAC C.F.S. CORP. VS TRANS OCEAN PACIFIC FORWARDING, INC.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEF. RETURNED FORWARDING.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BOBAC C.F.S. CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS OCEAN PACIFIC FORWARDING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS OCEAN PACIFIC FORWARDING, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOBAC C.F.S. CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRANS OCEAN PACIFIC FORWARDING, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, JUDGMENT TO PLFT FOR DAMAGES FOR SERVICE PROVIDED TO DEFT IN CONNECTION WITH DEFT'S TRANSPORTATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
